  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad taɯs Wahrds mannu/ un reglabvchui teivi no ra
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "kna/ tad efmu es to *eeekhnis/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "un taɯs Wahrds irr man par
Preeku/ un par mannas Sir̄ds
Lihgfinibu bijie/ jo es efmu pehz
tawa Wahrda notaukts/ ak
KUNGS Deew̄ Zebaoit!
* Eebr Wall: Es efmu to ehdis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es ne efmu fehdejs eeḱsch
to Mehdtaju Draudses/ un ne
efmu vreezajees (ar teem/) ta-
was Rohkas deht efmu estween-
tulis fehdejs/ jo tu efi manniar
Skumnibu pildtis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kapehz tad paleek man-
nas Sahpes bes Mitte-chanas/
un manna Mohziba tik gauscha?
ta ne gribb dseedinajama. Ar-
rig tu man taptu ka weens Wil-
tigajs/ ka (Awots) kas allasch
Uhdeni ne isdohd?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz fakka tas KUNGS
ta: Ja tu gribbi greestees/ kury
es tewi greesifchn/ tad buhs tew
mannā Preekfcha stahweht. Un
ja tu to Skaittu atschkir no ta
Neschkihsta/ tad buhti tu itt ka
mannā Mutte. Teem buhs pee
tewim greestees/ bet tu ne greest-
fees us winneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es efmu tewi prett
fcheein Laundim eezehlis par wee-
nu warraizu stipru Muhri/ tee
gann prett tewi karrohs/ bet
neneeka prett tewi ecspehs/ jo es
efmu ar tewim/ ka es tewi atpe-
stiju/ un tewi isglahbju/ fakka
tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teeschain/ es tewi atpe-
stifchn no tahs Rohkas to Lau-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XVI. Nodalla.
Deews aisleeds tam Praweetam weenu See
remt/ un Behrnus dsemdinaht/ un Raun
Mammā cet/ nedā tohs Nokantus nosch
loht/ nedā Dshru Mammā eet: 1.
Par Preekfch Sihmi/ ka tas KUNGS w
fu Preeku no saweem faudim grib a
remt: 9. Tapehz ka tee winnu irr atstah
shi: 11. Tomehr buhs teem pehz pabeig
Sohdibas fakrahteem: 14/ 18. Un li
ar teem Paganeem pee Kristus Walsti
aizinateem tapt: 19.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Vn ta KUNga Wahrs
notikke uhs manni/
Tazzija:
2. Tew ne buhs See
remt/ tew arri ne buhs ne
Dehluā/ nedā Meitas fchtā
Weetā dsemdinaht.
3. Jo ta fakka tas KUNGS
no teem Dehleem un Meitahā
kas schai Weetā peedsenum/
no winnu Mahtehm/ kas to
dsemde/ un no winnu Tehwee
kas tohs schai Semme dsemdin
4. Tee nomirs zaur nah
gahn Sehrgahm/ tee ne ta
noschebloti/ nedā aprakti/
buhs par Dubteem wirs Se
mes/ un taps zaur Sohbin
un zaur Baddu aprihti/ un w
nu nomirruschas Meeas bu
teen Putneem appafch Debb
un teem Swehreem wirs Se
mes par Barribu.
6. Jo ta fakka tas KUNGS
Tew ne buhs Rauda-Nam
eet/ un ne eij scheblodamee
nedā Noschehlochannu pabr te
turredans. Jo ta fakka
KUNG
"
    }
  ],
